headline: These S&P500 stocks are moving in today's after hours session
summary: The US market session of Tuesday is over, let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers in the after hours session today.

headline: Tuesday's after hours session: top gainers and losers
summary: As the regular session of the US market on Tuesday comes to an end, let's delve into the after-hours session and discover the top gainers and losers shaping the post-market sentiment.

headline: Strength Seen in 4D Molecular Therapeutics (FDMT): Can Its 7.9% Jump Turn into More Strength?
summary: 4D Molecular Therapeutics (FDMT) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
